essence: Monitors and optimises manufacturing processes to maintain product quality and throughput.

identity.title: Process Technician
identity.summary: Operates process equipment, collects data, troubleshoots process issues, and implements adjustments to meet quality and efficiency targets.

salary.notes: Specialist process technicians in chemical or pharmaceutical sectors earn premiums.

qualifications: Technical qualification in process operations or engineering
Experience with process control systems and instrumentation
Understanding of quality and safety procedures

lifestyle.description: Shift work in production environments with a focus on monitoring, data collection, and rapid response to process deviations.

habits: Adjusts equipment and parameters to maintain quality
Collaborates with engineers on process improvements
